title: Presch Wood Chisel Set 6 pcs. (6, 12, 18, 24, 32 & 38mm) - Fully Polished for immediate use - for Professionals with a 25° Angle and Robust Metal Striking Cap
features: Everything included: The wood chisel set contains 6 high-quality chisels (6mm, 12mm, 18mm, 24mm, 32mm, 38mm) for precise woodworking. Perfect for professionals.
Unpack and get started: Your new chisel set comes fully sharpened and ready to use. This allows you to start immediately without spending time sharpening.

Precise: The particularly ergonomic handles and the high-quality steel characterize this wood chisel set. They are extremely precisely sharpened for exact carving and simultaneously very hard for heavy-duty chiseling.
Optimal angle: Each chisel has a precisely ground 25° edge. Ideal for consistently performing accurate carving or chiseling tasks.
Striking cap for hammer blows: The metal striking cap protects the handle when working with a wooden mallet. Perfect for carpentry and woodworking tasks.
description: Product Description Precision and durability combined: PRESCH Wood Chisels PRESCH Wood Chisels Efficient. Powerful. Precise. PRESCH Wood Chisels are ideal for precise woodworking. You can use them to create fine details or effortlessly remove material. The hardened steel remains powerful for a long time. The ergonomic handle sits securely in the hand and ensures optimum power transmission. Perfect for anyone who values quality and precision! The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Previous page Perfectly pre-ground The Wood Chisels are pre-machined and ready to use for precise woodworking! Safe and convenient Non-slip handle made of PP and TPR - dampens vibrations and is easy to clean. Precision according to standard 25° angle for the ideal balance of durability, efficiency and versatility. Durable and ready to use Hardened steel for long-lasting performance and high precision. Robust and durable Sturdy impact cap for precise and powerful work. Next page 1 Ready for immediate use 2 Ergonomic handle 3 Precision angle 4 Maximum hardness 5 Impact cap Do the Wood Chisels need to be protected against rust? Yes, we recommend cleaning the Wood Chisels after use with a lightly oiled cloth. The oil film protects against moisture and rust. Are the Wood Chisels supplied ready for use? Yes, our Wood Chisels are ready to use, so you can get started as soon as you unpack them. Can I use the Wood Chisels with a hammer? Yes, the robust impact cap protects the handle and makes the Wood Chisels durable, even with heavy blows. Are the Wood Chisels also suitable for hardwood? Yes, thanks to hardened steel, they are ideal for processing hardwood precisely and reliably. Can the Wood Chisels be reconditioned when they are worn? Yes, our Wood Chisels can be easily reconditioned. They retain their shape and performance over a long period of time, which ensures long-lasting use. Complementary products Wood Chisel Set 10 pcs.
